title: Argentinian Corn Fritters
description: A delicious fusion of Argentinian flavors and American corn fritters, served with a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the cornmeal, flour, salt, pepper, and cumin.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg and crumbled cheese.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Add the corn kernels and stir until the mixture is well combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the mixture into the hot oil.
Cook the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the fritters hot with a crunchy crumble topping.
